nasb.text: So David said to the young man who told him, “How do you know that Saul and his son Jonathan are dead?”

esv.text: Then David said to the young man who told him, “How do you know that Saul and his son Jonathan are dead?”

cnv.text: 於是，大衛問那向他報信的年輕人：“你怎麼知道掃羅和他的兒子死了呢？”

ccb.text: 大卫又问报信的青年：“你怎么知道扫罗和他儿子约拿单死了？”
